situation: Player is on their first attempt
tip: Start in the middle of the range to eliminate half the numbers immediately.

situation: Guess was more than 20 away from secret
tip: You're far off — make a bold jump toward the center of the remaining range.

situation: Guess was within 10 of the secret
tip: You're getting close! Split the remaining gap in half for your next guess.

situation: Guess was within 3 of the secret
tip: Almost there! Try one number higher or lower than your last guess.

situation: Player has 2 or fewer attempts remaining
tip: High pressure! Use binary search — pick the exact midpoint of what's left.
Go lower. Cut the upper half of your range — the secret is below your guess.
Go higher. Cut the lower half of your range — the secret is above your guess.
